节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The url module provides APIs for parsing URL strings and constructing URL instances to process URL strings.
The URLSearchParams interface defines some practical methods to process URL query strings.

A parameterized constructor used to create an URLSearchParams instance. As the input parameter of the constructor function, init supports four types. The input parameter is a character string two-dimensional array. The input parameter is the object list. The input parameter is a character string. The input parameter is the URLSearchParams object.
注释信息: @param { string[][] | Record<string, string> | string | URLSearchParams } init - init init

parameters.说明: init init

节点.功能描述: Appends a specified key/value pair as a new search parameter.
注释信息: @param { string } name - name name Key name of the search parameter to be inserted.
@param { string } value - value value Values of search parameters to be inserted.

parameters.说明: name name Key name of the search parameter to be inserted.
value value Values of search parameters to be inserted.

节点.功能描述: Deletes the given search parameter and its associated value,from the list of all search parameters.
注释信息: @param { string } name - name name Name of the key-value pair to be deleted.

parameters.说明: name name Name of the key-value pair to be deleted.

节点.功能描述: Returns all key-value pairs associated with a given search parameter as an array.
注释信息: @param { string } name - name name Specifies the name of a key value.
@returns { string[] } string[] Returns all key-value pairs with the specified name.

parameters.说明: name name Specifies the name of a key value.

节点.return_description: string[] Returns all key-value pairs with the specified name.

节点.功能描述: Returns an ES6 iterator. Each item of the iterator is a JavaScript Array. The first item of Array is name, and the second item of Array is value.
注释信息: @returns { IterableIterator<[string, string]> } Returns an iterator for ES6.

节点.功能描述: Callback functions are used to traverse key-value pairs on the URLSearchParams instance object.
注释信息: @param { function } callbackFn - callbackFn callbackFn Current traversal key value.
@param { Object } thisArg - thisArg thisArg thisArg to be used as this value for when callbackFn is called

parameters.说明: callbackFn callbackFn Current traversal key value.
thisArg thisArg thisArg to be used as this value for when callbackFn is called

节点.功能描述: Returns the first value associated to the given search parameter.
注释信息: @param { string } name - name name Specifies the name of a key-value pair.
@returns { string | null } Returns the first value found by name. If no value is found, null is returned.

parameters.说明: name name Specifies the name of a key-value pair.

节点.return_description: Returns the first value found by name. If no value is found, null is returned.

节点.功能描述: Returns a Boolean that indicates whether a parameter with the specified name exists.
注释信息: @param { string } name - name name Specifies the name of a key-value pair.
@returns { boolean } Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether a found

parameters.说明: name name Specifies the name of a key-value pair.

节点.return_description: Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether a found

节点.功能描述: Sets the value associated with a given search parameter to the given value. If there were several matching values, this method deletes the others. If the search parameter doesn't exist, this method creates it.
注释信息: @param { string } name - name name Key name of the parameter to be set.
@param { string } value - value value Indicates the parameter value to be set.

parameters.说明: name name Key name of the parameter to be set.
value value Indicates the parameter value to be set.

节点.功能描述: Sort all key/value pairs contained in this object in place and return undefined.
Returns an iterator allowing to go through all keys contained in this object.
注释信息: @returns { IterableIterator<string> } Returns an ES6 Iterator over the names of each name-value pair.
节点.return_description: Returns an ES6 Iterator over the names of each name-value pair.

节点.功能描述: Returns an iterator allowing to go through all values contained in this object.
注释信息: @returns { IterableIterator<string> } Returns an ES6 Iterator over the values of each name-value pair.
节点.return_description: Returns an ES6 Iterator over the values of each name-value pair.

节点.功能描述: Returns an iterator allowing to go through all key/value pairs contained in this object. The first item of Array is name, and the second item of Array is value.
注释信息: @returns { IterableIterator<[string, string]> } Returns an ES6 iterator. Each item of the iterator is a JavaScript Array.
节点.return_description: Returns an ES6 iterator. Each item of the iterator is a JavaScript Array.

节点.功能描述: Returns a query string suitable for use in a URL.
注释信息: @returns { string } Returns a search parameter serialized as a string, percent-encoded if necessary.
节点.return_description: Returns a search parameter serialized as a string, percent-encoded if necessary.

节点.功能描述: The URLParams interface defines some practical methods to process URL query strings.

A constructor used to create a URLParams instance. - string[][]: two-dimensional string array. - Record<string, string>: list of objects. - string: string. - URLParams: object. The default value is null.
注释信息: @param { string[][] | Record<string, string> | string | URLParams } [init] - Input parameter objects, which include the following:
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types; 2.Parameter verification failed.

parameters.说明: string[][] | Record<string, string> | string | URLParams } [init] - Input parameter objects, which include the following:

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types; 2.Parameter verification failed.

节点.功能描述: Appends a key-value pair into the query string. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Key of the key-value pair to append.
@param { string } value - Value of the key-value pair to append.

parameters.说明: Key of the key-value pair to append.
Value of the key-value pair to append.

节点.功能描述: Deletes key-value pairs of the specified key. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Key of the key-value pairs to delete.

parameters.说明: Key of the key-value pairs to delete.

节点.功能描述: Obtains all the values based on the specified key. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @returns { string[] } string[] Returns all key-value pairs with the specified name.

parameters.说明: Target key.

节点.return_description: string[] Returns all key-value pairs with the specified name.

节点.功能描述: Obtains an ES6 iterator. Each item of the iterator is a JavaScript array, and the first and second fields of each array are the key and value respectively.
注释信息: @returns { IterableIterator<[string, string]> } Returns an iterator for ES6.

节点.功能描述: Callback functions are used to traverse key-value pairs on the URLParams instance object. key Indicates the name of the key that is traversed. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { function } callbackFn - callbackFn value Current traversal key value,
@param { Object } [thisArg] - thisArg thisArg to be used as this value for when callbackFn is called

parameters.说明: callbackFn value Current traversal key value,
Object } [thisArg] - thisArg thisArg to be used as this value for when callbackFn is called

节点.功能描述: Obtains the value of the first key-value pair based on the specified key. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Key specified to obtain the value.
@returns { string | null } Returns the first value found by name. If no value is found, null is returned.

parameters.说明: Key specified to obtain the value.

节点.return_description: Returns the first value found by name. If no value is found, null is returned.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether a key has a value. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Key specified to search for its value.
@returns { boolean } Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether a found

parameters.说明: Key specified to search for its value.

节点.return_description: Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether a found

节点.功能描述: Sets the value for a key. If key-value pairs matching the specified key exist, the value of the first key-value pair will be set to the specified value and other key-value pairs will be deleted. Otherwise, the key-value pair will be appended to the query string. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Key of the value to set.

parameters.说明: Key of the value to set.
Value to set.

节点.功能描述: Sorts all key-value pairs contained in this object based on the Unicode code points of the keys and returns undefined. This method uses a stable sorting algorithm, that is, the relative order between key-value pairs with equal keys is retained.
Obtains an ES6 iterator that contains the keys of all the key-value pairs.
注释信息: @returns { IterableIterator<string> } Returns an ES6 Iterator over the names of each name-value pair.
节点.return_description: Returns an ES6 Iterator over the names of each name-value pair.

节点.功能描述: Obtains an ES6 iterator that contains the values of all the key-value pairs.
注释信息: @returns { IterableIterator<string> } Returns an ES6 Iterator over the values of each name-value pair.
节点.return_description: Returns an ES6 Iterator over the values of each name-value pair.

节点.功能描述: Obtains an ES6 iterator. Each item of the iterator is a JavaScript array, and the first and second fields ofeach array are the key and value respectively. The first item of Array is name, and the second item of Array is value.
注释信息: @returns { IterableIterator<[string, string]> } Returns an ES6 iterator. Each item of the iterator is a JavaScript Array.
节点.return_description: Returns an ES6 iterator. Each item of the iterator is a JavaScript Array.

节点.功能描述: Obtains search parameters that are serialized as a string and, if necessary, percent-encodes the characters in the string.
注释信息: @returns { string } Returns a search parameter serialized as a string, percent-encoded if necessary.
节点.return_description: Returns a search parameter serialized as a string, percent-encoded if necessary.

节点.功能描述: The interface of URL is used to parse, construct, normalize, and encode URLs.

URL constructor, which is used to instantiate a URL object. url: Absolute or relative input URL to resolve. Base is required if input is relative. If input is an absolute value, base ignores the value. base: Base URL to parse if input is not absolute.

parameters.说明: url url
base base

节点.功能描述: A no-argument constructor used to create a URL. It returns a URL object after parseURL is called. It is not used independently.

Parses a URL. In the case of a relative URL, you must specify base to parse the final URL. In the case of an absolute URL, the passed base will be ignored. - string: string. - URL: URL object. This parameter is used when url is a relative URL. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } url - A string representing an absolute or a relative URL.
@param { string | URL } [base] - Either a string or an object. The default value is undefined.

parameters.说明: A string representing an absolute or a relative URL.
string | URL } [base] - Either a string or an object. The default value is undefined.

节点.功能描述: Converts the parsed URL into a string.
注释信息: @returns { string } Returns the serialized URL as a string.
节点.return_description: Returns the serialized URL as a string.

节点.功能描述: Converts the parsed URL into a JSON string.
注释信息: @returns { string } Returns the serialized URL as a string.
节点.return_description: Returns the serialized URL as a string.

节点.功能描述: Gets and sets the fragment portion of the URL.
Gets and sets the host portion of the URL.
Gets and sets the host name portion of the URL，not include the port.
Gets and sets the serialized URL.
Gets the read-only serialization of the URL's origin.
Gets and sets the password portion of the URL.
Gets and sets the path portion of the URL.
Gets and sets the port portion of the URL.
Gets and sets the protocol portion of the URL.
Gets and sets the serialized query portion of the URL.

Gets the URLSearchParams object that represents the URL query parameter. This property is read-only, but URLSearchParams provides an object that can be used to change the URL instance. To replace the entire query parameter for a URL, use url.searchsetter.

Gets the URLParams object that represents the URL query parameter. This property is read-only, but URLParams provides an object that can be used to change the URL instance. To replace the entire query parameter for a URL, use url.searchsetter.
Gets and sets the username portion of the URL.
